sub_modules.fp_mult_unpack: Combinational IEEE-754 input decode, sign calculation, mantissa construction, unbiased exponent generation, and special-value detection.
sub_modules.fp_mult_exp_product: Combinational significand multiplication and unbiased exponent addition.
sub_modules.fp_mult_normalize: Combinational product normalization with guard, round, and sticky bit extraction.
sub_modules.fp_mult_round: Combinational round-to-nearest-even significand rounding with exponent carry adjustment.
sub_modules.fp_mult_pack: Combinational IEEE-754 result packing with NaN, infinity, zero, overflow, normal, and underflow priority handling.
